section.heading: Applicability of subchapter

content.p: Parts B, C, D, E, and F of this subchapter do not apply to subchapter VII of this chapter.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 89–10, title VIII, § 8102, formerly title IX, § 9102, as added Pub. L. 107–110, title IX, § 901, Jan. 8, 2002, 115 Stat. 1966; renumbered title VIII, § 8102, and amended Pub. L. 114–95, title VIII, §§ 8001(a)(1), 8003, Dec. 10, 2015, 129 Stat. 2088, 2089, 2099.)

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 7802, Pub. L. 89–10, title IX, § 9102, as added Pub. L. 103–382, title I, § 101, Oct. 20, 1994, 108 Stat. 3774, set out purpose of provisions relating to Indian education, prior to the general amendment of former subchapter IX of this chapter by Pub. L. 107–110.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 2015—Pub. L. 114–95, § 8003, substituted “Parts B, C, D, E, and F of this subchapter do not apply to subchapter VII” for “Parts B, C, D, and E of this subchapter do not apply to subchapter VIII”.

note.heading: Effective Date of 2015 Amendment
note.p: Amendment by Pub. L. 114–95 effective Dec. 10, 2015, except with respect to certain noncompetitive programs and competitive programs, see section 5 of Pub. L. 114–95, set out as a note under section 6301 of this title.
